channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar subsidiary commissions final 4 MW of 100 MW wind project
item.description:
ACME Eco Clean Energy Private Limited, a subsidiary of ACME Solar Holdings Limited, has commissioned an additional 4 MW capacity of its 100 MW wind power project located in Titoda, Surendaranagar, Gujarat, on April 13, 2026. This latest commissioning brings the total capacity of the project to 100 MW, marking its full completion. The commissioning has been verified by officials from Gujarat Energy Development Agency (GEDA) and Paschim Gujarat Vij Company Limited (PGVCL), with the formal certificate anticipated shortly. This represents a significant operational milestone for the company.

  • ACME Solar's subsidiary commissioned an additional 4 MW wind capacity.
  • This completes the full 100 MW wind power project in Gujarat.
  • Commissioning confirmed by Gujarat Energy Development Agency officials.
  • Formal certificate for the project is expected shortly.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Project Update

item.title: [LEMONTREE] Lemon Tree: 56 Signings, 20 Openings in FY26; Portfolio to 269 Hotels
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd. reported a record portfolio expansion in FY 2025-26, driven by 56 new signings and 20 hotel openings. The company's operational portfolio now exceeds 130 hotels and 11,000 keys across 80+ destinations, reinforcing its transition to a disciplined, asset-light growth model. Expansion focused on high-growth urban markets, tier II and III cities, and emerging leisure and pilgrimage destinations like Tirupati, Ayodhya, and Somnath. The growth was diversified across its brands, with the core Lemon Tree Hotels brand leading with 27 signings. By March 31, 2026, the total portfolio reached 269 hotels, comprising 131 operating and 138 in the pipeline, positioning the company for consistent, long-term growth.

  • LTHL achieved record portfolio expansion in FY26 with 56 new signings and 20 hotel openings.
  • Operational portfolio now exceeds 130 hotels and 11,000 keys across 80+ destinations.
  • Company is leveraging an asset-light growth model for rapid scaling and consistency.
  • Expansion targets high-growth urban, tier II/III, and diverse leisure/pilgrimage markets.
  • Total portfolio reached 269 hotels by March 31, 2026, with 138 properties in the pipeline.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [UCOBANK] UCO Bank appoints Rajeev Gupta as Chief Risk Officer
item.description:
UCO Bank announced the appointment of Mr. Rajeev Gupta as its new Chief Risk Officer (CRO), effective April 14, 2026. Mr. Gupta, a General Manager, takes over from Mr. Shashi Kant Kumar, who has been reassigned to the role of Zonal Head, Mumbai. Mr. Gupta brings over 29 years of extensive experience in the banking sector, with significant professional exposure in risk management, overseas operations, and core banking functions. He holds a B.Com, MBA (Finance), and a Post Graduate Diploma in Banking, along with certifications in banking and risk management.

  • Mr. Rajeev Gupta appointed as UCO Bank's Chief Risk Officer.
  • The appointment is effective from April 14, 2026.
  • Mr. Shashi Kant Kumar, previous CRO, reassigned as Zonal Head, Mumbai.
  • Mr. Gupta has over 29 years of banking and risk management experience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UCO BANK | Category: Management Change

item.title: [VESUVIUS] Vesuvius India Files BRSR Report for FY2025
item.description:
Vesuvius India Ltd has submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. This report, which is part of the company's Annual Report, provides comprehensive disclosures on its environmental, social, and governance (ESG) performance. It details the company's business activities, including manufacturing refractory products (57% of turnover) and providing refractory services (43% of turnover). The report also outlines the company's operational footprint, serving 21 states nationally and 25 international countries, with exports contributing 2.9% to total turnover in 2025. The full report is accessible on the company's website.

  • Vesuvius India submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report for FY2025.
  • The report details manufacturing (57% turnover) and refractory services (43% turnover).
  • Company operates nationally in 21 states and internationally in 25 countries.
  • Exports contributed 2.9% to total turnover in FY2025.
  • The full BRSR is available on the company's website for investor review.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VESUVIUS INDIA LTD. | Category: ESG

item.title: [RITES] RITES JV MMG-Metro Management Group Liquidated
item.description:
RITES Ltd has announced the liquidation of MMG-Metro Management Group Limited, a joint venture company. MMG was formed in partnership with Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) and the Israeli firm M/s. Poran Shrem Engineering and Appraisal Limited. This intimation follows a previous disclosure made on December 27, 2024, and is in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • RITES Ltd announced the liquidation of its joint venture, MMG-Metro Management Group Limited.
  • MMG was a JV with DMRC and Poran Shrem Engineering and Appraisal Limited.
  • The liquidation follows a previous intimation from December 2024.
  • This marks the formal closure of the joint venture entity.
  • The announcement complies with SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RITES Ltd | Category: Joint Venture

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar commissions 4th phase of 32.366 MW BESS project in Rajasthan
item.description:
ACME Solar Holdings Limited (ASHL), through its wholly owned subsidiary ACME Surya Power Private Limited, has commissioned the fourth phase of its Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project. This phase, located at Jaimalsar, Bikaner, Rajasthan, adds 32.366 MW / 145.435 MWh capacity. The commissioning occurred on April 13, 2026, with the Commercial Operation Date (COD) set for April 15, 2026. With this latest commissioning, ACME Surya Power Private Limited has achieved a total commissioned capacity of 139.509 MW / 626.875 MWh for the BESS project.

  • ACME Solar commissioned the fourth phase of its BESS project.
  • This phase adds 32.366 MW / 145.435 MWh capacity.
  • Total commissioned BESS capacity reached 139.509 MW / 626.875 MWh.
  • Commercial operations for this phase begin April 15, 2026.
  • The project is located in Jaimalsar, Bikaner, Rajasthan.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Project Update

item.title: [LICI] LIC Board Approves 1:1 Bonus Equity Share Issue
item.description:
Life Insurance Corporation of India's Board of Directors approved the issuance of bonus equity shares in a 1:1 proportion to existing shareholders. This proposal is subject to shareholder approval, with the record date to be announced later. The bonus issue will increase the paid-up equity share capital from ₹6,324.99 crores to ₹12,649.99 crores. LIC stated that this move aims to reward shareholders, balance paid-up capital with accumulated reserves, and enhance liquidity and marketability of shares. The company clarified that the bonus issue will not impact its solvency margin or other financial parameters. CEO & MD, Shri R Doraiswamy, highlighted LIC's consistent dividend payments since listing and expressed confidence in the company's transformation initiatives.

  • LIC Board approved a 1:1 bonus equity share issue.
  • The bonus issue is subject to shareholder approval; record date to be announced.
  • Paid-up capital will double from ₹6,324.99 Cr to ₹12,649.99 Cr.
  • Aims to reward shareholders, balance capital/reserves, and enhance liquidity.
  • Bonus issue will not impact solvency margin or other financial parameters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Life Insurance Corporation of India | Category: Bonus

item.title: [JIOFIN] Jio Financial Board to meet Apr 17, 2026 for Q4/FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Jio Financial Services Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will hold a meeting on Friday, April 17, 2026. The key items on the agenda include the consideration and approval of the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a dividend on the company's equity shares for the fiscal year 2026. An analyst presentation on these financial results is also scheduled for the same day, following the board meeting.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 17, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Board will recommend dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Analyst presentation on financial results to be held post-meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jio Financial Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VESUVIUS] Vesuvius India Releases FY25 Annual Report & 35th AGM Notice
item.description:
Vesuvius India Ltd has released its Annual Report for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, in compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations. Concurrently, the company issued the Notice for its 35th Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 10:30 A.M. (IST) in Kolkata. The Annual Report encompasses various sections including financial statements, management discussion & analysis, board's report, corporate governance, and business responsibility & sustainability report. Both the Annual Report and the AGM Notice are accessible on the company's official website.

  • Vesuvius India released its Annual Report for FY25.
  • Notice for the 35th Annual General Meeting (AGM) issued.
  • AGM scheduled for May 7, 2026, at 10:30 AM in Kolkata.
  • Annual Report includes financial statements and ESG details.
  • Documents are accessible on the company's official website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VESUVIUS INDIA LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [RNAVAL] NCLT Directs SDHIL Shareholder Meeting for Merger Scheme
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Ltd (SDHIL) announced updates on its scheme of amalgamation with Triumph Offshore Private Limited (TOPL). Following the Board's approval on November 22, 2024, the Hon'ble NCLT issued an order on April 13, 2026. The NCLT has directed SDHIL to convene a meeting of its Equity Shareholders on May 25, 2026, to consider the proposed scheme. Significantly, the NCLT has dispensed with the requirement for convening meetings of TOPL's Equity Shareholders and all secured and unsecured creditors of both SDHIL and TOPL. This marks a key regulatory step forward for the merger.

  • NCLT approved scheme of amalgamation between SDHIL and TOPL.
  • SDHIL to hold Equity Shareholders meeting on May 25, 2026.
  • NCLT waived meetings for TOPL shareholders and all creditors.
  • Regulatory approvals for the merger are progressing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Reliance Naval and Engineering Ltd | Category: Merger
